final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a beauty skincare brand named "LUMEA BEAUTY".

Style/medium: needs a clean, bright, airy, feminine aesthetic with floral accents — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a three-column hero layout (left: text/CTA column, center: model subject, right: product display column) with a header nav bar above and a benefit cards row below
Subject: must include all of the following:
  Center: young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum
  Right column: moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle + packaging box; 3 floating white rounded-rectangle stat cards with gold accents labeled「満足度 96%」/「美容成分 5種配合」/「愛用者 12,000人突破」
Scene/backdrop: needs a soft, airy interior or studio backdrop with purple floral accent elements — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, diffused feminine lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be soft pink and white dominant, with purple flower accents — exact tonal ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a light, fresh surface treatment — exact texture and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include all of the following, verbatim:
  Header — logo wordmark:「LUMEA BEAUTY」; nav links (×5):「特徴」/「成分」/「お客様の声」/「使い方」/「FAQ」; CTA button:「今すぐ試す」
  Left column — headline:「鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。」; subheadline:「乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。」
  Feature badges (pill-shaped with small icons, ×3):「敏感肌OK」/「高保湿」/「朝晩使える」
  Bullet points (pink checkmarks, ×3):「美容成分をしっかり届ける」/「ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ」/「続けやすいシンプルケア」
  CTA buttons (×2):「初回限定で試してみる >」/「成分をチェック >」
  Trust badges:「送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし」
  Bottom benefit cards (horizontal white rounded rectangles with icons, ×3):「うるおい」/「透明感」/「使いやすさ」
Constraints: must preserve all text elements verbatim in Japanese script; all 3 layout zones (header / hero 3-column / bottom benefit row) must be visible in a single mockup frame
Avoid:
